---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for FajarOS Nova
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear description of the feature you would like to see.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Context Annotation

Which context does this feature belong to?

- [ ] `@kernel` -- Ring 0 kernel core (scheduler, IPC, memory)
- [ ] `@device` -- Hardware driver or device service
- [ ] `@safe` -- Userspace service or application
- [ ] `@unsafe` -- Low-level boot or context switch code

## Proposed Implementation

Briefly describe how this could be implemented. Include relevant syscalls,
IPC messages, or service interfaces if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you have considered.
